texto: Friendship is like a stubborn child who is playing hide and seek with your life. You have to find him at the darkest places of your heart in difficult times. And when you find the child
autor: his smile will light up the darkness of your life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a his smile will light up the darkness of your life.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Friendship is like a stubborn child who is playing hide and seek with your life. You have to find…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, sandeep-sharma, let-the-game-begin pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao-noturna.
